Element.Name: Document Identifier
Element.Description: Identifies the specification of content and rules that apply to the transaction.

Element.Name: Process Identifier
Element.Description: Identifies the business process context in which the transaction appears.

Element.Name: CV identifier
Element.Description: Document identifier for referencing the document instance.

Element.Name: Role
Element.Description: The role or job title that the CV applies to.

Element.Name: Issue Date
Element.Description: The date on which the transaction instance was issued, format YYYY-MM-DD.

Element.Name: Issue Time
Element.Description: The time on which the transaction instance was issued.

Element.Name: Economic Operator
Element.Description: The party who sends the CV - the Economic Operator.

Element.Name: Electronic Address Identifier
Element.Description: The electronic address identifier of the Economic Operator.

Element.Name: Name
Element.Description: The party name of the Economic Operator.

Element.Name: Country
Element.Description: The country where the Economic Operator is registered.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Contact Email Address
Element.Description: Contact person's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Contracting Authority
Element.Description: The party who receives the CV - the Contracting Authority.

Element.Name: Electronic Address Identifier
Element.Description: The electronic address identifier of the Contracting Authority.

Element.Name: Name
Element.Description: The name of the Contracting Authority.

Element.Name: Country
Element.Description: The country where the Contracting Authority is registered.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Contact Email Address
Element.Description: Contact person's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Police certificate
Element.Description: Information about the candidate's police certificate.

Element.Name: Police certificate identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Police certificate type
Element.Description: The type of the certificate.

Element.Name: Valid to date
Element.Description: The date to which the certificate is valid.

Element.Name: Police certificate documentation
Element.Description: The candidate's police certificate documentation.

Element.Name: Attached document
Element.Description: A binary large object containing an attached document. Base64 encoded.

Element.Name: Police certificate documentation URI
Element.Description: URI reference for the police certificate documentation.

Element.Name: Education information
Element.Description: Information about the candidate's education.

Element.Name: Education identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Education title
Element.Description: The name of the education.

Element.Name: Education degree
Element.Description: The candidate's education degree. Use code list EducationDegree.

Element.Name: Period
Element.Description: The period the candidate completed the education.

Element.Name: Start date
Element.Description: Education start date.

Element.Name: End date
Element.Description: Education end date.

Element.Name: Education documentation
Element.Description: The candidate's educational documentation.

Element.Name: Attached document
Element.Description: A binary large object containing an attached document. Base64 encoded.

Element.Name: Education documentation URI
Element.Description: Education documentation URI reference, e.g. from vitnemålsportalen.

Element.Name: Contact Information
Element.Description: Contact information related to the candidate's education.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Contact Email Address
Element.Description: Contact person's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Course information
Element.Description: Information about a course the candidate has completed.

Element.Name: Course identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Course title
Element.Description: The specific name of the course.

Element.Name: Course version
Element.Description: The version of the course.

Element.Name: Period
Element.Description: The period the course was completed.

Element.Name: Course start date
Element.Description: Course start date.

Element.Name: Course end date
Element.Description: Course end date.

Element.Name: Course supplier party
Element.Description: The party who organised the course.

Element.Name: Electronic Address Identifier
Element.Description: The electronic address identifier of the supplier party.

Element.Name: Name
Element.Description: The party name of the supplier party.

Element.Name: Supplier party country
Element.Description: Supplier party's country of registration.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name at the supplier party.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Supplier Party Email Address
Element.Description: Supplier party's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Course documentation
Element.Description: The candidate's course documentation.

Element.Name: Attached document
Element.Description: A binary large object containing an attached document. Base64 encoded.

Element.Name: Course documentation URI
Element.Description: Course documentation URI reference.

Element.Name: Certification information
Element.Description: Information about a certification the candidate has obtained.

Element.Name: Certification identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Certification title
Element.Description: The specific name of the certification.

Element.Name: Certification version
Element.Description: The version of the certification.

Element.Name: Valid to date
Element.Description: The date the certification is valid to.

Element.Name: Certification supplier party
Element.Description: The party who issued the certification.

Element.Name: Electronic Address Identifier
Element.Description: The electronic address identifier of the supplier party.

Element.Name: Name
Element.Description: The party name of the supplier party.

Element.Name: Supplier party country
Element.Description: Supplier party's country of registration.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name at the supplier party.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Supplier Party Email Address
Element.Description: Supplier party's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Certification documentation
Element.Description: The candidate's certification documentation.

Element.Name: Attached document
Element.Description: A binary large object containing an attached document. Base64 encoded.

Element.Name: Certification documentation URI
Element.Description: Certification documentation URI reference.

Element.Name: Language skills information
Element.Description: Information about a language the candidate masters.

Element.Name: Language skills identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Language
Element.Description: The specific language. Use code list ISO639.

Element.Name: Scandinavian
Element.Description: Set to true if the language is no, sv or da (Scandinavian language).

Element.Name: Oral skill
Element.Description: Oral skill related to the specific language. Use EU Global Scale code list.

Element.Name: Written skill
Element.Description: Written skill related to the specific language. Use EU Global Scale code list.

Element.Name: Contact Information
Element.Description: Contact information related to the candidate's language skill.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Contact Email Address
Element.Description: Contact person's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Project experience information
Element.Description: Information about a specific project the candidate has participated in.

Element.Name: Project experience identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Experience type
Element.Description: The experience type, expressed using classification of occupations code.

Element.Name: Industry type
Element.Description: The industry type related to the project experience. Use code list NACE.

Element.Name: Workplace
Element.Description: The country where the project was carried out. Use code list ISO3166.

Element.Name: Job sector
Element.Description: The job sector for the project (private, public or other). Use code list sector.

Element.Name: Company information
Element.Description: General information about the company where the project experience was gained.

Element.Name: Electronic Address Identifier
Element.Description: The electronic address identifier of the company.

Element.Name: Name
Element.Description: The party name of the company.

Element.Name: Country
Element.Description: The country where the company is registered.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name at the company.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Contact Email Address
Element.Description: Contact person's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Project experience period
Element.Description: The period of the project experience.

Element.Name: Project experience start date
Element.Description: Project experience start date.

Element.Name: Project experience end date
Element.Description: Project experience end date.

Element.Name: Project experience description
Element.Description: Detailed description of the project experience.

Element.Name: Position percent
Element.Description: The candidate's work percentage in the specific project experience.

Element.Name: Role
Element.Description: The candidate's role in the project experience.

Element.Name: Activities
Element.Description: Detailed description of what the candidate has done in the specific project experience.
Element.Value: Developing web portal for X company.

Element.Name: Experience value
Element.Description: Quantitative information about the project value, size and the candidate's participation.

Element.Name: Project participation
Element.Description: The candidate's project participation length (typically in months).

Element.Name: Project size
Element.Description: The total size of the project (typically in months).

Element.Name: Project value
Element.Description: Total monetary value of the project.

Element.Name: Contact Information
Element.Description: Contact information for a reference person related to the project experience.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Contact Email Address
Element.Description: Contact person's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Work experience information
Element.Description: Information about the candidate's employment history.

Element.Name: Work experience identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Position level
Element.Description: The candidate's position level. Use code list ISCO/Styrk08.

Element.Name: Industry type
Element.Description: The industry type related to the work experience. Use code list NACE.

Element.Name: Workplace
Element.Description: The country where the work was carried out. Use code list ISO3166.

Element.Name: Job sector
Element.Description: The job sector for the work (private, public or other). Use code list sector.

Element.Name: Company information
Element.Description: General information about the company where the work experience was gained.

Element.Name: Electronic Address Identifier
Element.Description: The electronic address identifier of the company.

Element.Name: Name
Element.Description: The party name of the company.

Element.Name: Country
Element.Description: The country where the company is registered.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name at the company.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Contact Email Address
Element.Description: Contact person's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Work experience period
Element.Description: The period of employment.

Element.Name: Work experience start date
Element.Description: Work experience start date.

Element.Name: Work experience end date
Element.Description: Work experience end date.

Element.Name: Work experience description
Element.Description: Detailed description of the work experience.

Element.Name: Position percent
Element.Description: The candidate's work percentage in the specific work experience.

Element.Name: Role
Element.Description: The candidate's role in the work experience.

Element.Name: Activities
Element.Description: Detailed description of what the candidate has done in the specific work experience.
Element.Value: Testing and developing IT-systems in X company.

Element.Name: Contact Information
Element.Description: Contact information for a reference person related to the work experience.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Contact Email Address
Element.Description: Contact person's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Skills information
Element.Description: Information about a skill the candidate has.

Element.Name: Skills identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Skill type
Element.Description: The specific name of the skill expressed as code.

Element.Name: Skill version
Element.Description: The version of the skill.

Element.Name: Skill last practice
Element.Description: The last time the skill was practiced.

Element.Name: Skill minimum length practice
Element.Description: How long the skill was practiced continuously. State the minimum length in months.

Element.Name: Contact Information
Element.Description: Contact information for a reference person related to the skill.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Contact person's name.

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Contact person's role.

Element.Name: Contact Telephone Number
Element.Description: Contact person's telephone number.

Element.Name: Contact Email Address
Element.Description: Contact person's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Clearance information
Element.Description: Information about the candidate's security clearance.

Element.Name: Clearance identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Clearance level
Element.Description: The level of the specific clearance.

Element.Name: Clearance expiration date
Element.Description: The clearance's expiration date.

Element.Name: Clearance documentation
Element.Description: The candidate's clearance documentation.

Element.Name: Attached document
Element.Description: A binary large object containing an attached document. Base64 encoded.

Element.Name: Clearance documentation URI
Element.Description: Clearance documentation URI reference.

Element.Name: Personal information
Element.Description: Personal details about the candidate.

Element.Name: Personal information identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Candidate name
Element.Description: The candidate's full name.

Element.Name: Postal address
Element.Description: The candidate's postal address.

Element.Name: Address line
Element.Description: The main address line in an address.

Element.Name: Additional street line
Element.Description: An additional address line in an address that can be used to give further details supplementing the main line.

Element.Name: City Name
Element.Description: The common name of the city where the postal address is. The name is written in full rather than as a code.

Element.Name: Post code
Element.Description: The identifier for an addressable group of properties according to the relevant national postal service, such as a ZIP code or Post Code.

Element.Name: Country code
Element.Description: The country where the address is. The country should always be given by using ISO code 3166 alpha 2.

Element.Name: Contact information
Element.Description: The candidate's contact information.

Element.Name: Contact Name
Element.Description: Name of the candidate's contact (if different from candidate).

Element.Name: Contact person's role
Element.Description: Role of the contact.

Element.Name: Telephone number
Element.Description: The candidate's telephone number.

Element.Name: Electronic address
Element.Description: The candidate's e-mail address.

Element.Name: Additional information
Element.Description: Additional information about the candidate, not provided in other information groups.

Element.Name: Additional information identifier
Element.Description: Each line must have an identifier that is unique within the document to make it possible to positively reference the line. For example, from other documents.

Element.Name: Additional information title
Element.Description: A short title of the additional information.

Element.Name: Additional information description
Element.Description: A textual description of the specific information.
Element.Value: Chairman of the lawyers association for five years.

Element.Name: Additional information documentation
Element.Description: Documentation supporting the additional information.

Element.Name: Attached document
Element.Description: A binary large object containing an attached document. Base64 encoded.

Element.Name: Documentation URI
Element.Description: Additional information documentation URI reference.
